```{r}
sa_adm1_weekly <- sa_adm1_weekly
sa_adm1_weekly2019 <- sa_adm1_weekly[which(sa_adm1_weekly$year<2020),]

sum(sa_adm2_weekly$other_count)/sum(sa_adm2_weekly$disease)
sum(c(sa_adm2_weekly$other_count,sa_adm2_weekly$bact_count,sa_adm2_weekly$mening_count))
data2<- fread(file="/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/input_datasets/disease/SA_disease_point_base.csv",quote=FALSE, header = TRUE)
dattot <- data2[which(data2$year>2004 & data2$year<2020  )]

### grids per district
shp<-st_read("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/input_datasets/shps/gadm41_namematch_ZAF_2.shp")
shp$area_km2 <- as.numeric(st_area(shp)) / 10^6
lat <- -29
grid_area_km2 <- 123 * cos(lat * pi / 180)
grid_area_km2
shp$estimated_cells <- shp$area_km2 / 107.6


# Sum each of those columns
columns_of_interest <- c("disease", "age_lt6", "age_6t14","age_15t64","age_gt65","bact_count","mening_count","other_count","nvt","pcv7","pcv13",grep("Sero",colnames(sa_adm1_weekly),value=T))  
columns_of_interest <- grep("Sero",colnames(sa_adm1_weekly),value=T)
columns_of_interest <- grep("GPSC",colnames(sa_adm1_weekly),value=T)

summary_table <- data.frame(
  sub_group = columns_of_interest,
  count = colSums(sa_adm1_weekly2019[ , ..columns_of_interest], na.rm = TRUE)
)
summary_table[order(-summary_table$count), ]

sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$disease)
sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$mening_count)+sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$bact_count) + sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$other_count)
sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$ag)+sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$bact_count) + sum(sa_adm1_weekly2019$other_count)

### pm2.5 and disease correlations
get_cor <- function(data){
  data %>%
    summarise(
      r = cor(pm2p5, disease, use="complete.obs"),
      n = sum(complete.cases(pm2p5, disease))
    )
}
# periods <- tibble(
#   start = c(2005,2009,2009,2005,2011,2011,2005),
#   end   = c(2009,2020,2023,2011,2023,2020,2020)
# )
periods <- list(
  "2005-2009" = c(2005,2009),
  "2009-2020" = c(2009,2020),
  "2009-2023" = c(2009,2023),
  "2005-2011" = c(2005,2011),
  "2011-2020" = c(2011,2020),
  "2011-2023" = c(2011,2023),
  "2005-2020" = c(2005,2020),
  "2005-2023" = c(2005,2023)
)
cor_table <- lapply(names(periods), function(p){

  yrs <- periods[[p]]

  sa_adm2_weekly %>%
    filter(year >= yrs[1], year <= yrs[2]) %>%
    get_cor() %>%
    mutate(period = p)

}) %>% bind_rows()
```

#### TABLE S3 - FIGURE 2 ADJACENT
#### report random effects by space and month
```{r}
endyear = 2019
space = "adm2"
time = "weekly"
if(space == "adm1"){
shp<-st_read("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/input_datasets/shps/gadm41_namematch_ZAF_1.shp")
}else{
  shp<-st_read("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/input_datasets/shps/gadm41_namematch_ZAF_2.shp")
}
N = nrow(shp$NAME_1)

### spatial model
## create a table including the random effects for weekly models at province and district level
mat_both <- NULL
for(endyears in c(2019,2023)){
  endyear <- endyears
  basemod <- readRDS(file=paste0("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/models/base_models/base_model_",time,"_20092011_popdens_",space,"_",endyear,".rds"))
  N <- length(shp$NAME_1)
  spa <- basemod$summary.random$id_u[1:N,]
  
    ## matrix
    mat_re <- matrix(nrow = N, ncol = 8)
    mat_re[,1] <- paste0("2005-",endyear)
    mat_re[,2] <- paste0("weekly_",space)
    mat_re[,3] <- "spatial"
    if (space == "adm1") {
        mat_re[,4] <- shp$NAME_1
        mat_re[,5] <- shp$NAME_1
      } else if (space == "adm2") {
        mat_re[,4] <- shp$NAME_1
        mat_re[,5] <- shp$NAME_2
      }
    mat_re[,6] <- exp(spa$mean)
    mat_re[,7] <- exp(spa$'0.025quant')
    mat_re[,8] <- exp(spa$'0.975quant')
    mat_re <- data.frame(mat_re)
    mat_re[,6:8] <- sapply(mat_re[,6:8], as.numeric)
    colnames(mat_re) <- c("years", "space_time", "random_effect","effect_indicator","effect_indicator", "RR", "RR_lower","RR_upper")
    
    ## bind
    mat_both <- rbind(mat_both,mat_re)
}


### seasonal effect
## create a table including the random effects for weekly models at province and district level
mat_both_seas <- NULL
for(endyears in c(2019,2023)){
  endyear <- endyears
  basemod <- readRDS(file=paste0("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/models/base_models/base_model_",time,"_20092011_popdens_",space,"_",endyear,".rds"))
  seasmod <- basemod$summary.random$id_m
  N <- nrow(seasmod)
  
    ## matrix
    mat_re <- matrix(nrow = N, ncol = 8)
    mat_re[,1] <- paste0("2005-",endyear)
    mat_re[,2] <- paste0("weekly_",space)
    mat_re[,3] <- "seasonal"
    mat_re[,4] <- c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec")
    mat_re[,5] <- c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec")
    mat_re[,6] <- exp(seasmod$mean)
    mat_re[,7] <- exp(seasmod$'0.025quant')
    mat_re[,8] <- exp(seasmod$'0.975quant')
    mat_re <- data.frame(mat_re)
    mat_re[,6:8] <- sapply(mat_re[,6:8], as.numeric)
    colnames(mat_re) <- c("years", "space_time", "random_effect","effect_indicator","effect_indicator", "RR", "RR_lower","RR_upper")
    
    ## bind
    mat_both_seas <- rbind(mat_both_seas,mat_re)
}
matres <- rbind(mat_both, mat_both_seas)

write.table(matres, file = paste0("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/figures/random_effects/res_",space,"_",time,".csv"), quote = FALSE, sep = ",", col.names = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)
```


## OTHER EXPLORATORY FIGURES NOT IN THE PAPER
```{r}
# read in each
  lag8 <- fread(file=paste0("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/models/dlnms/bivariable/nointeraction_results_fits_weekly_adm2_bivariable_8_2019_templag0humlag3.csv"))
lag8$lagtotal <- "lag8"
  lag12 <- fread(file=paste0("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/models/dlnms/bivariable/nointeraction_results_fits_weekly_adm2_bivariable_12_2019_templag0humlag3.csv"))
  lag12$lagtotal <- "lag12"
  lag6 <- fread(file=paste0("/home/sbelman/Documents/env_sa_manuscript/models/dlnms/bivariable/nointeraction_results_fits_weekly_adm2_bivariable_6_2019_templag0humlag3.csv"))
  lag6$lagtotal <- "lag6"
  
  ### bind together and adjust variables
  lagcomp <- rbind(lag8, lag12,lag6)
  lagcomp <- lagcomp[which(lagcomp$cov2=="absh_lag3"),]

  ## rrs
  lagcomp$rr <- exp(lagcomp$fit)
lagcomp$lowerCI_rr <- exp(lagcomp$lowerCI)
lagcomp$upperCI_rr <- exp(lagcomp$upperCI)
lagcomp$cumrr <- exp(lagcomp$cumulative_fit)
lagcomp$cumlowerCI_rr <- exp(lagcomp$cum_lowerCI)
lagcomp$cumupperCI_rr <- exp(lagcomp$cum_upperCI)

### subset for cumulative
  lagcompspec <- subset(lagcomp, lagcomp$lag_num %in% c(3))
  
  ##plot cumulative
plot_lagscum <- ggplot(lagcompspec)+
  geom_line(aes(x=var,y=cumrr,group=interaction(lag_num, lagtotal, covariate), color=lagtotal),alpha=0.5)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color="red", alpha=0.6)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(x=var, ymin=cumlowerCI_rr,ymax=cumupperCI_rr, group=interaction(lag_num,lagtotal,covariate), fill=lagtotal),alpha=0.3)+
  labs(color = "", fill = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  xlab("Var")+
  ylab("Relative Risk")+
  scale_y_continuous(trans="log10")+
  ggtitle("lag comparisons")+
  xlab("concentration")+
  facet_grid(. ~ covariate, scales = "free_x")+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size=13),axis.title=element_text(size=13), 
        strip.text = element_text(size=13), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=1, size=13),
        legend.position = "right")
plot_lagscum

plot_lagsweekly <- ggplot(lagcomp[which(lagcomp$covariate=="so2_lag0")])+
  geom_line(aes(x=var,y=rr,group=interaction(lag_num, lagtotal, covariate), color=lagtotal),alpha=0.5)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color="red", alpha=0.6)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(x=var, ymin=lowerCI_rr,ymax=upperCI_rr, group=interaction(lag_num,lagtotal,covariate), fill=lagtotal),alpha=0.3)+
  labs(color = "", fill = "")+
  theme_bw()+
  xlab("Var")+
  ylab("Relative Risk")+
  scale_y_continuous(trans="log10")+
  ggtitle("lag comparisons")+
  xlab("concentration")+
  facet_grid(lagtotal ~ lag_num)+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size=13),axis.title=element_text(size=13), 
        strip.text = element_text(size=13), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=1, size=13),
        legend.position = "right")
plot_lagsweekly

```
